tfex_go.underlying: Gold with purity 99.5%, quoted in USD per troy ounce
tfex_go.settlement: cash-settled in THB; final settlement = LBMA Gold AM Fixing on the last trading day, no FX-rate adjustment

comex_gc.underlying: Gold assaying to a minimum of 995 fineness, quoted in U.S. dollars and cents per troy ounce
comex_gc.settlement: deliverable; physical delivery per COMEX Rulebook Chapter 113

basis_note: Signals are computed on the spot research series (e.g. XAUUSD), not on an executable contract. Executing via the mapped futures (see contract_mapping) carries research-series-vs-executed-contract basis risk: the futures price = spot + basis (carry, funding, roll), and contract multipliers, ticks, sessions and settlement currency differ from the research series. size_units and notional_usd are research-series units (troy ounces for gold), not contract counts.
